title: Vanilla: Smelting Blocks of Raw Ores
description: The ability to smelt blocks of raw ores.
body:
# About mod
This mod adds the ability to smelt blocks of raw ores. 
### For example:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
![Smelting block of raw iron](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1bea4162a73677c7893023104581e90e009e34b.png)
![Smelting block of raw gold](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85daa8aa890cc2b1df3843eff4254b8e75928a39.png)
</details>


## Compatibility with mods:
### 1.0.0:
- Ad Astra
- Immersive Engineering
- Create
### 1.0.5:
- Ad Astra
- Immersive Engineering
- Create
- Create: The Factory Must Grow
### 1.0.6:
- Ad Astra
- Immersive Engineering
- Create
- Create: The Factory Must Grow
- Vanilla: Enderium
### 1.1.0:
- Ad Astra
- Immersive Engineering
- Create
- Create: The Factory Must Grow
- Mekanism
